symptoms_raw: My dad is 65, he's had severe chest pain for two hours now, radiating to his left arm, and he's having trouble breathing. He's sweating a lot.
I've had sharp abdominal pain on my lower right side since last night. It's getting worse, and I feel nauseous. I have a low fever of about 100.5F.
I've been having persistent headaches for about a week, mostly behind my eyes. They get worse in the afternoon. I also feel more tired than usual and a bit dizzy sometimes.
I've had a sore throat and mild cough for about 4 days. My voice is a bit hoarse. No fever, I can still eat and drink normally, just uncomfortable.
My kid is 8, he's had a runny nose for three days, sneezing a lot. But he's still energetic, eating fine, sleeping well, no fever. Just a regular cold I think.
